title: Maintain and service shearing handpieces
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Maintain and service shearing handpieces demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify worn and faulty handpiece components and facilitate their repair

pcs.text: Assess the performance of the handpiece from personal observation and team member feedback
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the performance of the handpiece from personal observation and team member feedback?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the performance of the handpiece from personal observation and team member feedback.

pcs.text: Check and clean comb bed, cups and fork yokes in line with manufacturer specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and clean comb bed, cups and fork yokes in line with manufacturer specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and clean comb bed, cups and fork yokes in line with manufacturer specifications.

pcs.text: Identify worn and faulty handpiece components
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify worn and faulty handpiece components?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify worn and faulty handpiece components.

pcs.text: Access appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) and fit correctly
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Access appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) and fit correctly?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) and fit correctly.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Install minor repair kit components?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Install minor repair kit components.

pcs.text: Check faulty comb beds and assess the required scope of repairs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check faulty comb beds and assess the required scope of repairs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check faulty comb beds and assess the required scope of repairs.

pcs.text: Determine if there is a need for a technician to repair the fault, and if so, make appropriate arrangements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine if there is a need for a technician to repair the fault, and if so, make appropriate arrangements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine if there is a need for a technician to repair the fault, and if so, make appropriate arrangements.

elements.title: Service handpiece

pcs.text: Carry out repairs that do not require the services of a technician according to manufacturer specifications and work health and safety (WHS) policies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out repairs that do not require the services of a technician according to manufacturer specifications and work health and safety (WHS) policies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out repairs that do not require the services of a technician according to manufacturer specifications and work health and safety (WHS) policies.

pcs.text: Adjust handpiece components to maintain operational performance according to manufacturer specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Adjust handpiece components to maintain operational performance according to manufacturer specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Adjust handpiece components to maintain operational performance according to manufacturer specifications.

pcs.text: Lubricate handpiece and replace components requiring periodic replacement
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Lubricate handpiece and replace components requiring periodic replacement?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Lubricate handpiece and replace components requiring periodic replacement.

pcs.text: Identify wear and tear on handpiece in terms of effects on performance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify wear and tear on handpiece in terms of effects on performance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify wear and tear on handpiece in terms of effects on performance.

pcs.text: Install safety components and check before operation of the handpiece
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Install safety components and check before operation of the handpiece?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Install safety components and check before operation of the handpiece.

pcs.text: Run and check handpiece prior to use to determine safe operational performance

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Run and check handpiece prior to use to determine safe operational performance.
